body_html:
Hi Emanuella,

I wanted to follow up because I still do not have a clear read on what you are trying to finalize for your Emanuella Andrade.

Sometimes at this point it is not really about the food anymore. It is more that people are still trying to sort out timing, fit, or whether this is the right direction at all.

Would it make more sense for us to jump on a quick call at 10:00 AM, 11:00 AM, or 1:00 PM, or should I save you a spot for our next tasting on Sunday, May 3 at 2:00 PM?

-----
Regards,
Andre Raw
​​Catering Event Coordinator
📲 C: (978) 235-3791
📲 W: (978) 381-1212
Facebook | Instagram | Website

🍽️ Come Taste It First

If tasting makes more sense, I can save you a spot so you can experience the food before deciding from a distance.

Date: Sunday, May 3
Location: 199 Main St, Fitchburg, MA 01420
Time: 2:00 PM
Code: ANDRE

Seats are limited, so if you want in, reserve early.

Tasting Preview Tasting Registration

The last tasting was a blast, and I would rather let them experience it than guess from a distance.
